## Narrative Recap

Three strangers converged on Las Vegas Airport. [[Ronnie Vint]], a wiry British SAS trooper, and [[Guy LeFleur]], a scarred Québécois demolitions expert. They were recruited by [[Adrian Voss]] to capture a target.

Then they flew to Afghanistan.
